description_long: This is a classic wristwatch with a round gold-toned case and a white dial, featuring a brown textured leather strap. The dial is marked with gold indices and a single Arabic numeral '12' at the top, along with the brand name 'Hamilton' and the word 'Electric' in script. The watch has slender gold hour and minute hands, and a thin gold second hand. The back of the case is engraved with technical and branding information, and the strap has a crocodile or alligator pattern. The overall design is elegant and vintage, suitable for formal or everyday urban wear. The materials and finish suggest a high-quality, traditional timepiece.
description: A vintage-style Hamilton wristwatch with a gold case, white dial, and brown textured leather strap. Features gold indices, a single numeral, and elegant branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slim gold case and the thickness of the watch, with the brown leather strap visible.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the engraved gold case back and the textured brown leather strap.
description_view_2: Edge-on view highlighting the thin profile of the watch and strap.
description_view_3: Front view showing the white dial with gold indices, numeral '12', and the Hamilton logo, as well as the brown leather strap.
attribute_brand_logo: The Hamilton brand logo is present on the upper center of the dial, featuring the word 'HAMILTON' in uppercase letters and a stylized 'H' above it.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is white with gold stick indices for hour markers and a single gold Arabic numeral '12' at the top. The hands are slender and gold, with a simple, elegant design. The dial also features the word 'Electric' in script and the Hamilton logo, giving it a minimalist, vintage look.
attribute_strap_type: Brown textured leather strap with a crocodile or alligator pattern, stitched edges, and a classic design.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three gold hands (hour, minute, second) and no additional complications or subdials. The layout is clean and traditional.
